task: I need to send a quick note to my supervisor about a schedule change, but I only have a rough draft right now. Can you help me turn it into a short message I could send today?

turns.agent_response: Sure — send me your rough draft, and I’ll turn it into a short, plain message you can send today.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, here’s the rough one: “Hi Maria, I won’t be able to make my usual shift on Friday because I have a conflict. I wanted to let you know as soon as I could. Sorry for the inconvenience.”

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a shorter, cleaner version you could send:

**Hi Maria, I won’t be able to work my usual shift on Friday because of a conflict. I wanted to let you know as soon as possible. Sorry for the inconvenience.**

If you want, I can also make it sound:
- more casual
- more professional
- or a little warmer/apologetic

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short and plain, just like I wanted.
